items.title: CVE-2026-45480: Azure AD Elevation of Privilege
items.summary: Improper authentication in Azure AD allows unauthorized privilege escalation.

items.title: Microsoft June 2026 Security Advisory (AV26-569)
items.summary: Critical updates for multiple Microsoft products, including Azure services.

items.title: CVE-2026-31847: FortiAuthenticator RCE Vulnerability
items.summary: Unauthenticated RCE via crafted RADIUS authentication packet in FortiAuthenticator.

items.title: CISA Advisory: SAML Implementation Flaws in SSO Products
items.summary: Active exploitation of SAML flaws in enterprise SSO products reported.

items.title: CVE-2026-28391: Okta OIDC Token Validation Bypass
items.summary: Token validation flaw allows authentication bypass in specific OIDC configurations.
